$comment: Network/fetch ownership policy. Add entries only for committed security-reviewed egress owners.

secretHeaderOwners.justification: The background LLM transport is the only canonical outbound network seam that assembles Authorization headers from resolved model config.
secretHeaderOwners.reviewNote: Secret-bearing headers must not drift into UI, hooks, storage, or orchestration modules.

credentialedFetchOwners.justification: The export download owner is the canonical content-runtime seam for same-origin credentialed file fetches after URL narrowing.
credentialedFetchOwners.reviewNote: Keep credentialed page-context downloads narrowed and contained here.

credentialedFetchOwners.justification: The Froala parser owner resolves same-origin filename metadata for export flows after URL narrowing.
credentialedFetchOwners.reviewNote: Credentialed Froala fetches must stay same-origin and remain confined to this parser seam.

credentialedFetchOwners.justification: Fetches same-origin DOM-discovered snapshot assets after URL safety and origin narrowing.
credentialedFetchOwners.reviewNote: Do not expand v1 web snapshots to cross-origin or response-body capture here.
